free_text: Experimental site, A.T.,H.S.,E.I.,Y.S.
Y.W.,I.K.,M.H.
Preequilibrium (n,n') cross sections on nuclei around
atomic number 50 at En=14.1 MeV
The intense 14 MeV neutron source
OKTAVIAN of Osaka University
Less than 2 nsec pulsed neutrons were generated
Neutron flight path length was about 8.3 m
NE-213 liquid scintillator 25.4 cm in diameter
and 10.0 cm in length. Source neutron flux was
monitored by the other NE-213 scintillator with
5.08 cm diameter and 5.08 cm length, which was
set at 0 degree against the neutron beam line.
systematic uncertainties in detector
efficiency (5%),
intensity of source neutrons (3%),
subtraction of background (3%), and
multiple scattering correction (10%).
After addition of the statistical errors the overall
uncertainties were estimated to be 8-17% for the
double differential cross sections at 70 deg. At other
angles the uncertainties are larger because of poorer
counting statistics.
.Data from private communication from author
SJW
